title: ScannedDataAdventureGameLocationChoice
description: scanned_data shape for turn sheet type adventure_game_location_choice. Accepts programmatic format (choices), HTML form location format (location_choice), or HTML form object format (object_choice).

choices.description: Programmatic format: list of chosen location_id values

location_choice.description: HTML form format: single chosen location_id from radio input

object_choice.description: HTML form format: object interaction in the form '{object_instance_id}:{action_type}'
